query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN teamMemberId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_team_member,
  SUM(CASE WHEN teamMemberId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_team_member,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tenantId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_tenant
FROM calls;
command:

  SUM(CASE WHEN teamMemberId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_team_member,
  SUM(CASE WHEN tenantId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_tenant
FROM calls;
